description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages code_quality, build, test, and deploy using node:latest for most jobs and tmaier/docker-compose:latest with a docker:dind service for the e2e job. Add a build_packages job in the build stage that runs npm install then npm run build and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact. Add an eslint job in the code_quality stage that runs npm install followed by npm run eslint. Add a unit_test job in the test stage that runs npm install and then npm test. Add an e2e job in the test stage that uses the tmaier/docker-compose:latest image, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, runs docker-compose run application npm install, then executes NODE_ENV=docker docker-compose run codeceptjs ./node_modules/.bin/codeceptjs run, and stores codeceptjs/output-error/ and codeceptjs/snapshots/ as artifacts. Finally, add deploy_production and deploy_staging jobs in the deploy stage that only run on the master branch, each echoing a deployment message, with deploy_production marked manual and both defining environment names and URLs for production (https://production.example.com) and staging (https://staging.example.com).
